tasks.name: Create activity types
tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript types for activity data structure and time-grouped display

constraints: ActivityType must cover: presentation, lesson, quiz, assessment
ActivityItem must include: id, type, title, timestamp, metadata (quiz scores, etc.)
GroupedActivities must group by: today, yesterday, this_week, earlier

tasks.output_state: Types file created with ActivityItem, ActivityType, GroupedActivities, TimePeriod types
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/activity.ts with all required type exports

tasks.name: Create presentations activity loader
tasks.purpose: Fetch user's recent presentation submissions from building_blocks_submissions table

constraints: Query building_blocks_submissions table
Filter by user_id = current user
Filter by created_at/updated_at within last 30 days
Select: id, title, created_at, updated_at
Transform to ActivityItem[] with type='presentation'
Use performant RLS pattern: user_id = (select auth.uid())

tasks.input_state: ActivityItem type exists, building_blocks_submissions table exists
tasks.output_state: loadPresentationActivities function returns ActivityItem[] for presentations
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists in user-dashboard-page.loader.ts and returns presentation activities with proper type

tasks.name: Create lessons activity loader
tasks.purpose: Fetch user's completed lessons from lesson_progress table

constraints: Query lesson_progress table
Filter by user_id = current user
Filter by completed_at IS NOT NULL and within last 30 days
Select: id, lesson_id, completed_at
Transform to ActivityItem[] with type='lesson'
Use performant RLS pattern: user_id = (select auth.uid())

tasks.input_state: ActivityItem type exists, lesson_progress table exists
tasks.output_state: loadLessonActivities function returns ActivityItem[] for completed lessons
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists in user-dashboard-page.loader.ts and returns lesson activities with proper type

tasks.name: Create quizzes activity loader
tasks.purpose: Fetch user's completed quizzes with scores from quiz_attempts table

constraints: Query quiz_attempts table
Filter by user_id = current user
Filter by completed_at IS NOT NULL and within last 30 days
Select: id, quiz_id, completed_at, score, passed
Transform to ActivityItem[] with type='quiz' and metadata containing score/passed
Use performant RLS pattern: user_id = (select auth.uid())

tasks.input_state: ActivityItem type exists, quiz_attempts table exists
tasks.output_state: loadQuizActivities function returns ActivityItem[] for quizzes with score/passed metadata
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists in user-dashboard-page.loader.ts and returns quiz activities with score/passed in metadata

tasks.name: Create assessments activity loader
tasks.purpose: Fetch user's completed assessments from survey_responses table

constraints: Query survey_responses table
Filter by user_id = current user
Filter by completed = true and created_at within last 30 days
Select: id, survey_id, created_at
Transform to ActivityItem[] with type='assessment'
Use performant RLS pattern: user_id = (select auth.uid())

tasks.input_state: ActivityItem type exists, survey_responses table exists
tasks.output_state: loadAssessmentActivities function returns ActivityItem[] for completed assessments
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists in user-dashboard-page.loader.ts and returns assessment activities with proper type

tasks.name: Create activity aggregation function
tasks.purpose: Combine all activity loaders with Promise.all and return sorted ActivityItem[]

constraints: Use Promise.all to run all 4 loaders in parallel
Combine results into single ActivityItem[] array
Sort by timestamp descending (most recent first)
Export as cached function using React.cache()
Follow pattern from personal-account-billing-page.loader.ts

tasks.output_state: loadUserRecentActivity function returns sorted, aggregated ActivityItem[] from all sources
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists, uses Promise.all for parallel execution, and returns sorted combined activities

tasks.name: Create time grouping function
tasks.purpose: Group ActivityItem[] into time periods (today, yesterday, this week, earlier) using date-fns

constraints: Use date-fns for date comparisons
Group into: today, yesterday, this_week, earlier
Maintain chronological order within each group
Return GroupedActivities type
Handle empty groups gracefully

tasks.output_state: groupActivitiesByTime function returns GroupedActivities with items sorted into time periods
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists in user-dashboard-page.loader.ts and correctly groups activities by time period

tasks.name: Create ActivityItem component
tasks.purpose: Display individual activity with icon, title, timestamp, and metadata (quiz scores)

constraints: Use appropriate icon for each ActivityType
Show relative timestamp (e.g., '2 hours ago')
Show quiz score and pass/fail badge when type='quiz'
Use semantic HTML (article or list item)
Tailwind styling consistent with dashboard theme

tasks.output_state: ActivityItem component renders activity with icon, title, time, and conditional metadata
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists and renders all activity types with proper icons and metadata display

tasks.name: Create ActivitySection component
tasks.purpose: Display time period header (Today, Yesterday, etc.) with list of activities

constraints: Accept period label (string) and activities (ActivityItem[])
Render section header with period label
Map over activities and render ActivityItem components
Use semantic HTML (section or article)
Handle empty activities array gracefully

tasks.output_state: ActivitySection component renders time period header with activity list
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists and renders period header with mapped ActivityItem children

tasks.name: Create ActivityFeedCard component
tasks.purpose: Card wrapper containing all activity sections with Card UI components

constraints: Use Card components for layout structure
Accept GroupedActivities prop
Render ActivitySection for each non-empty time period
CardHeader with 'Recent Activity' title
CardContent with sections

tasks.input_state: ActivitySection component exists, GroupedActivities type exists
tasks.output_state: ActivityFeedCard component renders Card with all activity sections
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists and renders Card with header and activity sections

tasks.name: Create ActivityFeedWidget wrapper
tasks.purpose: Server component that loads activity data and renders ActivityFeedCard

constraints: Must be async server component (no 'use client')
Call loadUserRecentActivity() to fetch data
Call groupActivitiesByTime() to organize data
Pass grouped data to ActivityFeedCard
Handle loading with Suspense boundary (done in page integration)

tasks.input_state: ActivityFeedCard component and loader functions exist
tasks.output_state: ActivityFeedWidget fetches and renders activity feed with grouped data
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists, is async server component, and integrates loader with card

tasks.name: Create loading skeleton component
tasks.purpose: Skeleton UI to display during data fetch with Suspense

constraints: Use Skeleton components for loading placeholders
Match ActivityFeedCard layout structure
Show 3-4 skeleton activity items
Use Card wrapper for consistent styling

tasks.output_state: ActivityFeedSkeleton component renders loading placeholder matching card layout
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists and renders Card with Skeleton placeholders

tasks.name: Add empty state to ActivityFeedCard

action.target: empty state display when no activities exist

tasks.purpose: Show friendly message when user has no recent activity

constraints: Add conditional check in ActivityFeedCard
Show EmptyState when all activity groups are empty
Display helpful message encouraging user action
Use Activity icon from lucide-react

tasks.output_state: ActivityFeedCard shows EmptyState when no activities exist
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty state renders in card when activities array is empty

tasks.name: Add widget to dashboard page

action.target: ActivityFeedWidget to user dashboard page layout

tasks.purpose: Integrate activity feed widget into main dashboard with Suspense boundary

constraints: Import ActivityFeedWidget and ActivityFeedSkeleton
Add Suspense boundary with ActivityFeedSkeleton as fallback
Place widget in PageBody using grid layout
Ensure proper spacing and responsive design

tasks.input_state: ActivityFeedWidget and ActivityFeedSkeleton components exist, dashboard page exists
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page includes activity feed widget with loading state
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Widget renders on dashboard page with Suspense boundary and skeleton fallback
